documents.title: Synthetic access review note
documents.content: During a synthetic access review, the operator contact was review-team@example.test and the temporary api_key=sk_test_1234567890abcdef was rotated immediately after the exercise. The important retrieval fact is that the temporary token was rotated after review.

documents.title: Data minimization reminder
documents.content: The reminder says evaluation fixtures should use synthetic content, avoid real customer data, and prefer metadata-only sensitive finding assertions.

queries.query: what happened to the temporary token after review
expectedChunkContains: temporary token was rotated after review

queries.query: what kind of content should evaluation fixtures use
